cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: SMOKE HARNESS ONLY - validates the official profiler pipeline end-to-end on audit-like x86 CI hardware before model selection. Not the competition submission.

test_prompts.prompt: A workshop produces two products. Each unit of product A requires 3 hours of cutting and 5 hours of finishing; each unit of product B requires 5 hours of cutting and 4 hours of finishing. With 247 cutting hours and 286 finishing hours available, and profits of $40 per unit of A and $63 per unit of B, how many units of each maximize total profit, and what is that profit?
Let f(x) = x^3 - 48x - 2. Find every critical point of f and classify each as a local maximum or a local minimum.
